'''Talilia Weden''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Talilia Weden was [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and eventually passed the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. Accepting missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Weden was active during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a time of strife and conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the growing [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="HNN56" />

When the ''[[Moulee-rah Patogga]]'' was impounded at a [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] refueling station on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karnst]], Crew Chief [[Asador Leen]] of XTS contacted Republic [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] after suspecting that the light freighter was carrying illegal substances. With the Judiciaries ready to depart [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the High Council assigned Weden to accompany them and ensure a smooth boarding of the ship. Upon arrival, Weden led her team aboard the ship and discovered 3.5 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] worth of illegal [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Arresting [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Barada Rakul]] and his crew of five, it was quickly determined they were not aware of their illicit cargo.<ref name="HNN56" />

After the owners of the freighter, the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan, were notified of the discovery, the other clans began to voice their opinions. Blaming each other for the cargo's transport, the Besadii insisted that the freighter actually belonged to the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] clan and that they had planted the spice to create bad blood between the Republic and the Besadii.<ref name="HNN56" />
